name: $urandom_range single-argument call
description: Code should include a call to $urandom_range with a single maximum bound argument

name: $urandom_range two-argument call
description: Code should include a call to $urandom_range with both minimum and maximum bound arguments

name: $random or $urandom with optional seed
description: Code should include a call to $random or $urandom passing an integer seed variable as an inout argument

name: boolean cast from real value
description: Code should include a boolean conversion or cast of a real-valued expression in SystemVerilog
